0.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodule in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Density increases and linear atelectasis consistent with scarring in the left upper lobe inferior lingular segment

2.text: Density increases and linear atelectasis consistent with scarring in the left lower lobe mediobasal segment

3.text: Density increases and linear atelectasis consistent with scarring in the right middle lobe medial segment
